subcodes.first_line: The more tribulation increaseth, the more intense groweth My longing for God, whereby He distinguisheth between the steadfast and the doubter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلما یزداد البلاء یزداد اشتیاقی الی الله و به یمیز الله بین الموقن و المریب
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
